title: Checkout AI Assistant — Launch Pricing Strategy (Confidential)
author: sam.okafor
content:
LAUNCH PRICING STRATEGY — CONFIDENTIAL
Author: Sam Okafor | Date: 2026-04-22 11:00 UTC
Distribution: Internal only — do not share externally

Launch tiers:

Starter (Free):
- Up to 500 AI checkout summaries/month
- 1 store integration
- Standard support

Growth ($49/month):
- Unlimited AI summaries
- 5 store integrations
- Priority support
- Analytics dashboard

Enterprise (custom):
- Unlimited everything
- Dedicated support
- SLA guarantees
- Custom integrations

[CONFIDENTIAL: Introductory offer — first 3 months free on Growth plan for beta waitlist]
This pricing is not yet public. Legal review in progress (NOVA-141) for the free-trial language.
Do not include actual price points in any external communication until legal clears.

Competitive note: Competitor X charges $79/month for equivalent features. $49 positions us aggressively.
